exception_title: Data Analytics team broad production read access
compensating_controls: Data masking applied to all PII fields via Atlas field-level redaction rules; query audit logging enabled with 12-month retention; bulk export alerts configured for >5000 records; analytics queries routed through read replica to isolate production load
review_outcome: Renewed — compensating controls verified effective. Data masking audit confirmed all PII fields redacted. Extended to 2026-02-14.

exception_title: Billing service write access to invoices and payment_transactions
compensating_controls: Automated reconciliation checks run daily; all write operations logged to immutable audit trail; secondary approval required for modifications exceeding $10,000
review_outcome: Renewed — no anomalies detected in audit logs. Extended to 2026-01-08.

exception_title: Temporary elevated access for data warehouse migration
compensating_controls: Weekly access review by CISO; all operations logged to separate audit stream; access limited to migration-specific collections only
review_outcome: Expired — migration completed. Access reverted to standard permissions.
